name: Non-Foreign Affidavit Exemption

eligibility.description: The transferor must provide a valid U.S. TIN and swear under penalty of perjury they are not a foreign person.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Eliminates the requirement to withhold 15% on a real estate transaction if the transferor provides an affidavit stating they are a U.S. person.
